meta_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Antigravity project template to Solve no project ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code for SaaS.
content.answer_block: The 'no project idea' paralysis stems from over-analyzing features before validation. Use the Antigravity template to scaffold a production-ready SaaS architecture in minutes. By offloading boilerplate to Claude Code, you shift focus from coding infrastructure to solving high-value user problems, ensuring your MVP reaches the market before your momentum dies.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the drive to build, the capital to invest, and the technical aptitude to execute, yet you find yourself paralyzed by the 'what.' This isn't a lack of creativity; it is a lack of a framework. Without a validated blueprint, every hour spent coding is a gamble against irrelevance.

Today, we break the cycle. We are stripping away the complexity of modern stack configuration. By leveraging the Antigravity template, you aren't just starting a project; you are deploying a scalable, monetizable foundation. Stop guessing what to build and start building what solves real-world pain.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Establish a production-grade directory structure that prioritizes modularity and future-proofing your SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS boilerplate using the Antigravity template with authentication, Stripe billing, and database integration.

steps.title: Define Your Value Proposition
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map out the core feature that solves a specific, painful problem for a niche audience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the niche 'independent creators needing tax automation' and generate a schema for a MVP core feature.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a database schema for a SaaS tool solving tax automation for creators'

steps.title: Configure the Data Layer
steps.description: Set up your database to handle user state and billing data, ensuring compliance and security from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure PostgreSQL models for User, Subscription, and Project entities using the Antigravity ORM pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create Drizzle schema files based on the project entity requirements'

steps.title: Deploy the MVP Backend
steps.description: Connect your logic to the Antigravity API routes to ensure your frontend can communicate securely with your data layer.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement secure API endpoints for project creation and user authentication using Next.js and Antigravity middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement the backend logic for user registration and project creation'

steps.title: Validate and Launch
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on user feedback loops and optimize your landing page for conversion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting landing page component that highlights the unique value proposition of the SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Build a hero section component with a call-to-action for the waitlist'

pro_tips: Prioritize 'boring' stacks; use standard PostgreSQL and Next.js to ensure easy hiring later.
Never build custom auth; use the Antigravity pre-built providers to save 40+ hours of security work.
Ship the landing page before the backend; validate interest with a waitlist before writing core logic.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests as you build; it forces you to clarify your logic requirements.
Focus on the 'Day 1' user experience; if the user doesn't hit a value moment in under 2 minutes, rewrite the flow.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, integrate a feedback loop via a tool like Crisp or Typeform to capture user pain points, then use your Antigravity template to ship updates weekly.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer limited by a lack of ideas; you are limited only by your speed of execution. Stop overthinking the architecture and start solving the problems that people are willing to pay for. Your path to revenue starts with your first commit. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
